scripts.test: vitest run src/app.auth.test.ts src/app.rate-limit.test.ts src/app.prompt-injection.test.ts src/app.audit.test.ts src/app.pii.test.ts src/app.output-validation.test.ts src/providers/litellm-client.test.ts
